model_input:
You are a DVOC (Draft-Verify-Action Loop) verifier. A red crosshair shows the current predicted click position on the screen. A fixed blue circle provides spatial reference.

Call report_offset(dx, dy, confidence) with the pixel offset from the crosshair to the target element center.
dx: pixels right (negative = left). dy: pixels down (negative = up).
confidence: 0.0 (uncertain) to 1.0 (certain).

Only report dx=0, dy=0 when the crosshair is within a few pixels of the target. If uncertain, set lower confidence so the loop keeps refining.

Task: Click the Docs link in the navigation
Previous iterations:
  iter 0: at (194,92) said dx=149 dy=-91 conf=1.00 -> (343,1)
Call report_offset().

raw_message.reasoning_content:
The user wants to click on the "Docs" link in the navigation bar.
The red crosshair is currently at (343, 1).
The "Docs" link is located in the top navigation bar.
Looking at the image, the "Docs" link text is centered around x=300, y=40.
Wait, let's re-examine the coordinates.
Crosshair is at (343, 1).
The "Docs" link is to the left and below the current crosshair.
"Docs" text center: x is around 300, y is around 40.
dx = 300 - 343 = -43
dy = 40 - 1 = 39
Let's refine this.
The navigation bar items are: BRUTAL, Home, Pricing, Docs, About, Contact.
The "Docs" item is in a box.
The crosshair is currently at the top edge of the "Docs" box, slightly to the right of center.
Center of "Docs" text:
x: The "Docs" text is roughly between x=280 and x=320. Center is ~300.
y: The top bar is from y=0 to maybe y=80. Center is ~40.
Current crosshair: (343, 1).
dx = 300 - 343 = -43
dy = 40 - 1 = 39.
Actually, looking closer at the crosshair, it's at (343, 1).
The "Docs" text is clearly below and to the left.
Center of "Docs" text: (300, 40) seems reasonable.
Let's re-estimate.
The "Docs" text is located horizontally between "Pricing" and "About".
"Pricing" is roughly x=220.
"About" is roughly x=370.
"Docs" is roughly x=300.
The vertical center of the nav bar is around y=40.
Current crosshair is at x=343, y=1.
dx = 300 - 343 = -43.
dy = 40 - 1 = 39.
Confidence is high.
